goal: Keep the client/planning content SOP as an engineering subsystem with routing metadata, NAS/Obsidian context, material blocking, quality gates, media prompt normalization, and Harness validation.

acceptance_criteria.description: Content SOP tasks carry a quality policy and initial quality gate before generation.
Source-backed complete content SOP outputs pass blocking gates and remain review-required before external use.
Fact-sensitive content SOP outputs without source citations are blocked by Harness validation.
NAS/Obsidian memory hits are assembled into knowledge_context and source_citations for content SOP payloads.
Employee training cards teach material intake instead of hard-generating unsupported final drafts.
Content SOP documentation covers employee start, supplement-materials, confirm-delivery, and rollback workflow.
Ready content SOP tasks dispatch to Hermes while needs-materials tasks stay in material intake.
